summary: Integration infrastructure testing completed for CRM Global Clean Home. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Integrations page with 6 tabs verified working. All integrations show proper status indicators based on configuration.
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session for authentication. Test leads created for WhatsApp phone normalization testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Integration infrastructure fully tested. All 6 tabs on Integrations page work correctly: Overview (shows all integrations status), Emails (SendGrid status - not configured), Google Calendar (OAuth not configured, iCal fallback available), WhatsApp (number 0622665308 displayed, templates working), Webhooks (CRUD working), Widget Tracking (snippet and instructions for globalcleanhome.com). French phone normalization (0-prefix to +33) working correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/settings/integrations - requires auth, returns status for sendgrid, google_calendar, stripe, whatsapp, tracking_widget, zapier_webhooks
GET /api/gcal/status - requires auth, returns connected=false, configured=false (GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID empty)
GET /api/gcal/auth/login - returns 500 with 'non configure' message (correct behavior when not configured)
POST /api/gcal/disconnect - requires auth, succeeds even when not connected
POST /api/portal/magic-link - creates magic link, attempts email send (graceful fallback when SendGrid not configured)
POST /api/whatsapp/send - normalizes French phone 0622665308 -> 33622665308 for wa.me links
GET /api/widget/snippet - requires auth, returns HTML script tag
GET /api/widget/script - PUBLIC (no auth), returns JavaScript tracking code
Stripe status - mode=test, configured=true (sk_test_ prefix detected)
frontend_tests: 6 tabs present: Vue d'ensemble, Emails, Google Calendar, WhatsApp, Webhooks, Widget Tracking
Overview tab - shows Stripe test mode banner, all integration cards with status indicators
Email tab - shows SendGrid status card with 'En attente de cle API'
Google Calendar tab - shows OAuth card with 'Configuration requise' warning, iCal URL with copy button
WhatsApp tab - shows number 0622665308, 'Ouvrir WhatsApp' button, 5 templates (welcome, quote_ready, reminder, invoice, followup)
Webhooks tab - shows '+ Nouveau webhook' button, empty state message
Widget Tracking tab - shows installation instructions for globalcleanhome.com, script snippet with copy button

integration_status.sendgrid: NOT CONFIGURED (empty SENDGRID_API_KEY) - emails logged but not sent
integration_status.google_calendar: NOT CONFIGURED (empty GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET) - OAuth unavailable, iCal fallback works
integration_status.tracking_widget: CONFIGURED - script endpoint public, snippet requires auth

mocked_apis.sendgrid: Real SendGrid API ready but not configured - graceful fallback to logging
mocked_apis.google_calendar: Real Google OAuth ready but not configured - graceful error messages
